text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While doing some research in the<n>library, I hear a
sad voice...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I... can't save you all... I'm so sorry.<n>Not even
flowers are safe from my<n>bad luck...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww... Wahhh! The flowers!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Rice Shower is growing<n>flowers, but
the heatwave this year<n>has her worried that
they'll quickly<n>wilt.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
They'd finally bloomed... But then I<n>had to get
involved and screw up the<n>weather!
U-um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for eavesdropping, but<n>there's a
magazine I think you should<n>read.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hm? A special feature about<n>preserved flowers?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, it's a way to keep fresh<n>flowers
looking beautiful for longer.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The colors stay vibrant and the<n>flowers bloom
forever! It's like<n>something from a fairy tale!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...So doing this keeps the flowers<n>beautifully in
bloom?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rob Roy! I'm going to give<n>this a try!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't we go to a<n>flower
preserving class? The back of<n>the magazine
mentions one!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One of the conditions of the class is<n>that
attendees are supervised by an<n>adult, so they
ask me to go along with<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Before flowers can be preserved,<n>they must be
raised to peak bloom.<n>Then we can begin the
decolorization<n>and dehydration processes in
order to<n>extract the matter that causes wilting.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Today, our lesson begins following<n>the
completion of those steps,<n>meaning this is where
we get into<n>processing the flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'll do my best for my<n>precious flowers!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is the solution that keeps the<n>flowers
looking beautiful... I need to<n>be very careful with
it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Warm it up in the microwave to body
temperature...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: BOOM!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Th-the solution exploded<n>everywhere!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Awww, I have to remake the whole<n>thing again!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My pretty, pretty flowers, stay<n>beautiful and fair!
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It looks like you're casting a spell on<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? R-really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
My pretty, pretty flowers, stay<n>beautiful and fair!
Be bright, shiny,<n>and cuter than I can bear!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I did it!

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Great job! Now you should take them<n>home and
leave them to dry for two<n>days.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Now I can keep my flowers looking<n>gorgeous!
choice_data_list: I'd love to see them when they're done!
You must be excited to do this yourself next time!
You must be excited to do this yourself next time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Now I can keep my flowers looking<n>gorgeous!
choice_data_list: I'd love to see them when they're done!
You must be excited to do this yourself next time!
You must be excited to do this yourself next time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I'll try my best to preserve<n>them
perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'd love for you to see them too, Rob<n>Roy. My
flowers and I are in your<n>debt, after all...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! I'm looking forward to<n>seeing the
lasting beauty of your<n>magical flowers.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Rob Roy. Let's decorate our<n>room with
them when they're done!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've gotta make sure I review<n>what we did
today when I get home<n>so I don't forget!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'll help out too! I really think I've got<n>the knack
now!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rob Roy! I'm gonna do my<n>best!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she pictures her flowers, a smile<n>full of hope
and kindness spreads<n>across Rice Shower's
face.
